name: quick-airdrop
title: Quick AirDrop
description: Trigger the macOS AirDrop sheet for files, URLs, and clipboard contents — straight from Raycast
author: ridemountainpig

commands.name: airdrop-selected-file
commands.title: AirDrop Selected File
commands.description: AirDrop the file(s) currently selected in Finder

commands.name: airdrop-clipboard
commands.title: AirDrop Clipboard
commands.description: AirDrop whatever is on the clipboard — file, URL, or text

commands.name: airdrop-browser-tab
commands.title: AirDrop Browser Tab
commands.description: AirDrop the URL of the active browser tab

commands.name: airdrop-selected-text
commands.title: AirDrop Selected Text
commands.description: AirDrop the text currently selected in the frontmost app

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
